narrative:
Medina TWP township has 7,357 registered voters, with 49.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.8 percentage points.
